steps.t: Golodir is at Gath Forthnír in Angmar, far to the north of Rivendell. Gandalf the Grey has instructed you to return to Gath Forthnír and help Golodir …
Sara Oakheart is at Barad Gúlaran in Nan Gurth in Angmar. Barad Gúlaran is located in the centre of a series of bridges that surround it like the spok…
